purpose: No-secret routing matrix for approved downstream workflow targets. This file must not contain provider URLs, private destination details, provider secrets, tenant identifiers, or private values.
activationRule: External CRM, Google Workspace, and CodexOps targets can be activated only after a human-approved private workflow is chosen and configured through Firebase Secret Manager.

queues.label: Membership Waitlist
acceptance: Live membership capture stores a receipt-backed submission.
Private reporting shows membership_waitlist under routing summaries.
Future CRM target can tag first access without exposing public client code.

queues.label: Submission Review
acceptance: Submission payload includes public, privacy, terms, and submission terms versions.
Private reporting shows submission_review under routing summaries.
Future CodexOps target receives only review-packet fields, not private prompts.

queues.label: Event Access
acceptance: Event access capture stores receipt-backed inquiry data.
Private reporting shows event_access under routing summaries.
Future workflow target can distinguish invite interest from paid ticketing.

queues.label: Press Contact
acceptance: Press capture stores inquiry and consent values.
Private reporting shows press_contact under routing summaries.
Future workspace target can route public kit requests without exposing gated EPK materials.

queues.label: Partner / Licensing
acceptance: Partner and licensing captures route to partner_licensing.
Private reporting shows partner_licensing under routing summaries.
Future targets receive screened inquiry context only, not private deal files or internal operations.

queues.label: Strategic Access
acceptance: Investor capture stores a screened request without public deck details.
Private reporting shows strategic_access under routing summaries.
Future workspace target can route access review without exposing projections or data-room material.

queues.label: Access Review
acceptance: Portal and general access captures store role and inquiry context.
Private reporting shows access_review under routing summaries.
Future CodexOps target can create operator-reviewed packets without public internal app code.
